name: progress-demo
visual_summary: The Progress Demo UI component is a visually appealing progress bar used to track task completion or loading progress. It can be applied to a wide range of use cases, from simple task tracking to complex loading indicators. This component is ideal for designers and developers who need to showcase progress in their applications.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready loader component with the following characteristics:

Name: progress-demo
Description: The Progress Demo UI component is a visually appealing progress bar used to track task completion or loading progress. It can be applied to a wide range of use cases, from simple task tracking to complex loading indicators. This component is ideal for designers and developers who need to showcase progress in their applications.
Style: e.g. material, flat, minimal
Interactions: e.g. animated, progressive, responsive
Tags: progress, bar, loading, indicator, task, completion, animation

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
